glosses.hi: एक साथ; एक ही समय पर

sentences.target: Ich koche gleichzeitig und telefoniere kurz.

translations.de: Ich koche gleichzeitig und telefoniere kurz.
translations.en: I'm cooking and talking on the phone at the same time.
translations.es: Estoy cocinando y hablando un momento por teléfono a la vez.
translations.fr: Je cuisine et je passe un petit coup de fil en même temps.
translations.it: Sto cucinando e faccio una chiamata veloce allo stesso tempo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我一边做饭，一边打个电话。
translations.yue: 我一邊煮嘢食，一邊打個電話。
translations.ru: Я готовлю и одновременно недолго разговариваю по телефону.
translations.pt: Estou cozinhando e fazendo uma ligação rápida ao mesmo समय.
translations.he: אני מבשל ותוך כדי מדבר רגע בטלפון.
translations.tr: Aynı anda yemek yapıp kısa bir telefon görüşmesi yapıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi vừa nấu ăn vừa gọi điện một lát.
translations.ar: أنا أطبخ وأجري مكالمة سريعة في الوقت نفسه.
translations.nl: Ik kook en bel even tegelijk.
translations.uk: Я готую і водночас на хвильку телефоную.
translations.hi: मैं खाना बना रहा हूँ और साथ में थोड़ी देर के लिए फोन पर बात कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Gotuję i jednocześnie krótko rozmawiam przez telefon.
translations.el: Μαγειρεύω και μιλάω λίγο στο τηλέφωνο ταυτόχρονα.
translations.nb: Jeg lager mat og ringer kjapt samtidig.
translations.sv: Jag lagar mat och ringer ett snabbt samtal samtidigt.
translations.ro: Gătesc și dau un telefon rapid în același timp.
translations.cs: Vařím a zároveň si na chvilku volám.
translations.da: Jeg laver mad og tager et hurtigt opkald samtidig.
translations.fi: Laitan ruokaa ja soitan nopeasti samalla.
translations.ja: 料理しながら、ちょっと電話しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the coordinated predicate.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; first conjunct in a coordination of verbs.
Temporal adverb meaning ‘at the same time’; modifies the first conjunct (semantically indicating overlap with the other action).
Coordinating conjunction linking the two finite verbs.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; second conjunct in the coordination.
Degree/temporal adverb modifying ‘telefoniere’, indicating brief duration.

translations.en: The trains depart at the same time.
translations.es: Los trenes salen al mismo tiempo.
translations.fr: Les trains partent en même temps.
translations.it: I treni partono nello stesso momento.
translations.pt: Os trens partem ao mesmo tempo.
translations.vi: Các chuyến tàu khởi hành cùng lúc.
translations.hi: ट्रेनें एक ही समय पर रवाना होती हैं.
translations.pl: Pociągi odjeżdżają v tym samym czasie.
translations.id: Kereta berangkat pada saat yang sama.
translations.ja: 電車は同時に発車します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; agrees with ‘Züge’ as the subject.
Common noun, plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; verbal head of the separable verb ‘abfahren’ (to depart).
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates that the departures occur at the same time.
Separable particle completing the verb ‘abfahren’; placed in clause-final position in a main clause.

sentences.target: Du kannst gleichzeitig zuhören und schreiben.

translations.de: Du kannst gleichzeitig zuhören und schreiben.
translations.en: You can listen and write at the same time.
translations.es: Puedes escuchar y escribir al mismo tiempo.
translations.fr: Tu peux écouter et écrire en même temps.
translations.it: Puoi ascoltare e scrivere allo stesso tempo.
translations.ko: 너는 동시에 듣고 쓸 수 있어.
translations.ru: Ты можешь одновременно слушать и писать.
translations.pt: Você pode ouvir e escrever ao mesmo tempo.
translations.he: אתה יכול להקשיב ולכתוב באותו זמן.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể vừa nghe vừa viết.
translations.ar: يمكنك الاستماع والكتابة في الوقت نفسه.
translations.nl: Je kunt luisteren en schrijven tegelijk.
translations.uk: Ти можеш одночасно слухати й писати.
translations.hi: तुम एक साथ सुन सकते हो और लिख सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να ακούς και να γράφεις ταυτόχρονα.
translations.nb: Du kan høre og skrive samtidig.
translations.id: Kamu bisa mendengarkan vàn menulis pada saat yang sama.
translations.sv: Du kan lyssna och skriva samtidigt.
translations.ro: Poți să asculți și să scrii în același timp.
translations.da: Du kan lytte og skrive samtidig.
translations.fi: Voit kuunnella ja kirjoittaa yhtä aikaa.
translations.ja: 同時に聞いて書けます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects bare infinitives ‘zuhören’ and ‘schreiben’.
Temporal adverb with scope over the coordinated infinitival predicates.
Bare infinitive (separable verb not split in infinitival form with a modal); first conjunct selected by ‘kannst’.
Coordinating conjunction linking the two infinitives.
Bare infinitive; second conjunct in the coordinated complement of the modal.

sentences.target: Ich bin gleichzeitig nervös und froh.

translations.de: Ich bin gleichzeitig nervös und froh.
translations.en: I am nervous and happy at the same time.
translations.es: Estoy nervioso y contento a la vez.
translations.fr: Je suis à la fois nerveux y content.
translations.it: Sono allo stesso tempo nervoso e felice.
translations.pt: Estou nervoso e feliz ao mesmo tempo.
translations.tr: Aynı anda hem gergin hem mutluyum.
translations.vi: Tôi vừa lo lắng vừa vui.
translations.ar: أنا متوتر وسعيد في الوقت نفسه.
translations.nl: Ik ben tegelijk nerveus en blij.
translations.hi: मैं एक ही समय पर घबराया हुआ और खुश हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg er nervøs og glad samtidig.
translations.id: Aku merasa gugup dan senang pada saat yang sama.
translations.sv: Jag är nervös och glad samtidigt.
translations.ro: Sunt în același timp nervos și fericit.
translations.cs: Jsem zároveň nervózní a mám radost.
translations.da: Jeg er nervøs og glad på samme tid.
translations.fi: Olen samaan aikaan hermoctunut ja iloinen.
translations.ja: 同時に緊張していて、うれしいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person singular; links the subject to predicative adjectives.
Adverb modifying the predicate, indicating concurrent emotional states.
Predicative adjective; first conjunct in the coordinated complement of the copula.
Coordinating conjunction linking the two predicative adjectives.
Predicative adjective; second conjunct in the coordinated complement of the copula.
